chain.thought: Explanation: The Open Cup column shows “did not qualify” in 14 seasons: 1999–2006 (8 times) and 2008–2013 (6 times), with only 1998 and 2007 listed as “1st round.” Therefore, they did not qualify a total of 14 times.

judge_thought: Explanation: The Open Cup column shows "did not qualify" in all years except 1998 ("1st round") and 2007 ("1st round"). That means there are 16 total years minus 2 qualifying years = 14 instances of "did not qualify."
